text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Can you feel the excitement in the air, Trainer?
You could cut the tension with a knife.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The eyes of the crowd are on us, watching our
every move.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A fitting stage to demonstrate my skills, don't you
agree?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But of course. Victory is the podium from which
the Emperor leads her people!
